overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk environment, beginning in a sleek corporate interior with digital art displays, transitioning via elevator through a lobby, and exiting into a bustling neon-lit city street with palm trees and digital billboards. The footage is from a video game engine, showcasing high-fidelity architectural visualization.

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through a modern corporate hallway with dark walls and digital art displays. Red accent lighting runs along the floor edges while ceiling spotlights illuminate the path forward toward an elevator at the end of the corridor.

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a cyan-lit elevator lobby featuring a glitching digital display, then enters the elevator car. After a brief ride with closed doors, the elevator opens to reveal a new lobby area with different lighting and decor.

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a walk through a spacious corporate lobby with polished marble floors, large advertising posters on the walls, and potted plants. The camera approaches glass exit doors that reveal the bright urban street outside.

futuristic vehicles driving along the multi-lane road

tropical palm trees lining the sidewalk in planters

segments.scene_description: The camera exits into a bright, bustling futuristic city street lined with palm trees and massive digital billboards. Pedestrians walk along the wide sidewalk while futuristic vehicles drive past on the road. The architecture features sleek glass skyscrapers with prominent signage including a large 'SEOCHO' district marker visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the sterile, controlled environment of a corporate interior into the vibrant chaos of a futuristic metropolis. It begins by gliding through a dark corporate hallway accented by red floor lighting and digital art, moving steadily toward an elevator at the end of the corridor. As the camera enters a cyan-lit lobby and rides the elevator, the scene shifts to a spacious corporate foyer characterized by polished marble floors, advertising posters, and greenery. The perspective then pushes through glass exit doors, causing the interior lighting to give way to the brilliant glare of a bustling city street. Finally, the view expands to reveal a wide sidewalk lined with palm trees and massive digital billboards, with futuristic vehicles and skyscrapers stretching toward a distant SEOCHO district marker.
